home.heroHeadline: Connect, verify and monitor your EnteleKRON ecosystem wallet.
home.heroSubtitle: EnteleWALLET Lite is the security-first wallet access layer for the EnteleKRON ecosystem. Connect your existing wallet, verify ownership with safe signatures, monitor assets in read-only mode, and access official transparency resources — without storing seed phrases, private keys, or custoding funds.
home.productIdentity: Security-first wallet interface · Transparency-aware dashboard · Future non-custodial wallet foundation
home.walletFlowSubtitle: A security-first wallet access flow aligned with the EnteleKRON architecture — connect, verify, and monitor without custodial risk.
home.walletFlowStep1Description: Connect your existing wallet via MetaMask, WalletConnect, or Coinbase Wallet through the RainbowKit connection modal.
home.walletFlowStep2Description: Sign a SIWE (EIP-4361) message to prove wallet ownership. No gas fees, no transactions, no spending approvals.
home.walletFlowStep3Description: View ENK, SOVRA, EnergieMIND and ecosystem token balances in read-only mode via multicall batching.
home.walletFlowStep4Description: Link to transparency resources, official domains, vesting preparation, and future investor workflows across the TVK Group infrastructure.
home.positioningTitle: What EnteleWALLET Lite does — and does not do
home.positioningDoes1: Connect to existing wallets through established providers such as MetaMask, WalletConnect, and Coinbase Wallet.
home.positioningDoes2: Verify wallet ownership through safe message signatures only.
home.positioningDoes3: Monitor EnteleKRON ecosystem assets in read-only mode.
home.positioningDoes4: Provide access to official domains, transparency resources, and verified ecosystem addresses.
home.positioningDoes5: Prepare future investor vesting dashboard integration for qualified ecosystem participants.
home.positioningDoesNot1: Store seed phrases, recovery phrases, or wallet passwords.
home.positioningDoesNot2: Store private keys or export wallet secrets.
home.positioningDoesNot3: Custody funds or hold user assets on your behalf.
home.positioningDoesNot4: Create new wallets or generate seed phrases inside EnteleWALLET Lite.
home.positioningDoesNot5: Transfer tokens, send transactions, or move funds on your behalf.
home.positioningDoesNot6: Approve token spending or sign malicious contract approvals.
home.positioningDoesNot7: Open investor claims, distributions, or redemption flows yet.
home.positioningDoesNot8: Provide investment, tax, legal, or financial advice.
home.positioningDoesNot9: Guarantee token value, liquidity, exchange listing, or returns.
home.positioningDoesNot10: Replace your existing wallet provider or browser extension.
home.positioningDoesNot11: Request remote access to your computer, phone, or device.
home.positioningDoesNot12: Ask for payment, seed phrases, or private keys through social media messages.
home.litePhaseDescription: The Lite phase focuses on secure wallet connection, ownership verification, read-only monitoring, and official trust resources for the EnteleKRON ecosystem.
home.futurePhaseDescription: Future phases may include vesting dashboards, claims workflows, transaction tools, and a full non-custodial wallet experience. These are not active in EnteleWALLET Lite today.
home.ecosystemPreviewDescription: EnteleWALLET Lite is designed as the wallet access layer connecting users to EnteleKRON, ENK, SOVRA, EnergieMIND, EnteleSCAN, EnteleVAULT, and the broader TVK Group infrastructure.
home.noticeText: EnteleWALLET Lite is a wallet connection and verification interface under active development. Digital assets involve risk. Always verify official domains before connecting a wallet or signing any message.

features.title: Security-first wallet access for the EnteleKRON ecosystem
features.subtitle: EnteleWALLET Lite provides the core access layer for connecting, verifying, and monitoring your wallet — with a clear separation between active Lite capabilities and future wallet functionality.
features.featureSecurityCenterDescription: Access official wallet safety guidance, signature rules, phishing protection, and security reporting.
features.featureClaimReadinessDescription: Prepared pathways for future qualified investor claims. Claims are not open in EnteleWALLET Lite.
features.featureInvestorAppDescription: Prepared integration with the official EnteleKRON investor platform for verified wallet profiles.
features.featureCreateWalletDescription: Future ability to create a new non-custodial wallet within EnteleWALLET.
features.featureImportWalletDescription: Future ability to import an existing wallet using encrypted local key storage.
features.featureEncryptedStorageDescription: Future encrypted on-device key storage for the full non-custodial wallet application.
features.featureMobileAppDescription: Future native mobile application for EnteleWALLET.
features.featureBrowserExtensionDescription: Future browser extension for EnteleWALLET wallet access.
features.featureTxSimulationDescription: Future transaction preview and simulation before signing.
features.featureApprovalWarningsDescription: Future warnings for risky token approvals and spending permissions.
features.featureWalletConnectModeDescription: Future WalletConnect-based wallet mode for supported devices and dApps.
features.featureSmartAccountDescription: Future account abstraction and smart account capabilities.
features.featureAuditsDescription: Future independent third-party security audits before full wallet release.
features.featureBugBountyDescription: Future formal bug bounty program for responsible vulnerability disclosure.
features.featureWalletConnectionDescription: Connect established wallets through trusted providers. EnteleWALLET Lite does not create wallets or generate seed phrases.
features.featureVerificationDescription: Verify wallet ownership using safe, read-only message signatures that do not transfer tokens, approve spending, or cost gas.
features.featureMonitoringDescription: Monitor EnteleKRON ecosystem token balances and wallet-linked visibility in read-only mode without moving funds.
features.featureEnkDashboardDescription: Prepared dashboard views for ENK and ecosystem asset visibility connected to verified wallet addresses.
features.featureDomainsDescription: Access verified EnteleWALLET and EnteleKRON domains, transparency links, and official address resources.
features.featureTransparencyDescription: Link to the EnteleKRON Transparency Center to verify contracts, treasury wallets, presale wallets, and ecosystem addresses.
features.featureVestingDescription: Future dashboard integration for qualified investors to view vesting schedules and ecosystem allocation visibility.
features.featureClaimsDescription: Future claims and distribution workflows for qualified ecosystem participants. Not open in Lite.
features.featureSendReceiveDescription: Future non-custodial send and receive capabilities within the full EnteleWALLET application.
features.featureSwapDescription: Future swap and routing tools for supported ecosystem assets.
features.featureStakeDescription: Future staking, governance, and utility interactions for ENK and connected ecosystem modules.
features.featureSovraDescription: Future intelligent assistance for wallet safety, ecosystem navigation, and user guidance through SOVRA.
features.featureHardwareDescription: Expanded hardware wallet routes and signing safety for Ledger and compatible devices.
features.featureRecoveryDescription: Future recovery education and architecture for secure wallet continuity without custodial storage.
features.ctaDescription: Review the Security Center and official domains before connecting your wallet.

security.title: Security-first wallet access for the EnteleKRON ecosystem
security.subtitle: EnteleWALLET is being built with a security-first approach for wallet verification, ecosystem asset monitoring, and future non-custodial wallet functionality.
security.domainsIntro: Only use the domains listed below when connecting a wallet or signing messages with EnteleWALLET.
security.domainsWarning: Always check the domain before connecting a wallet or signing any message.
security.liteNoSeed: EnteleWALLET Lite does not store seed phrases
security.liteNoKeys: EnteleWALLET Lite does not store private keys
security.liteNoCustody: EnteleWALLET Lite does not custody funds
security.liteConnectOnly: EnteleWALLET Lite connects to existing wallets only
security.liteVerify: Wallet verification uses safe message signatures only
security.sigOwnership: A valid EnteleWALLET signature must only verify wallet ownership
security.sigNoTx: It must not create a blockchain transaction
security.signatureWarning: Never sign messages you do not understand.
security.seedTitle: Seed Phrase and Private Key Warning
security.seedIntro: EnteleWALLET, EnteleKRON, TVK Group, TVK Labs, SOVRA, support staff, admins, partners, or community moderators will never ask for:
security.walletsIntro: EnteleWALLET Lite connects to established wallet providers. Always verify you are using the official wallet application or extension.
security.verifyText: Use the Transparency Center to verify official contracts, treasury wallets, presale wallets, and ecosystem addresses.
security.phishSocial: Never trust payment addresses sent by Telegram, Discord, X, Instagram, WhatsApp, email, or direct messages
security.phishDashboard: Always verify payment instructions inside the official investor dashboard
security.phishBookmark: Bookmark the official domains listed on this page
security.phishSsl: Verify SSL/HTTPS before entering wallet credentials
security.phishSearch: Avoid sponsored search-result links for wallet access
security.roadmapIntro: These capabilities are planned for future EnteleWALLET releases. They are not active today.
security.contactIntro: If you discover a vulnerability, phishing site, or impersonation attempt, report it to our security team.
security.legalText: EnteleWALLET Lite is a wallet connection and verification interface. It does not custody funds, store seed phrases, provide investment advice, or guarantee token value, liquidity, listing, or returns.

ecosystem.title: Connected to the EnteleKRON architecture
ecosystem.subtitle: EnteleWALLET Lite is the wallet access layer linking users to the EnteleKRON trust infrastructure, ENK utility, SOVRA intelligence, and modular TVK Group ecosystem components.
ecosystem.architectureDescription: EnteleWALLET is designed to connect verified wallets to ecosystem modules, transparency resources, identity pathways, and future utility workflows without replacing your existing wallet provider.
ecosystem.entelekronDescription: Trust infrastructure platform organizing identity, verification, integrity, and interoperability across the TVK ecosystem.
ecosystem.enkDescription: Utility token powering governance, access, and network operations within the EnteleKRON ecosystem.
ecosystem.sovraDescription: Intelligence layer coordinating modules, trust workflows, and future AI-assisted wallet guidance.
ecosystem.energiemindDescription: Energy infrastructure module connected to the broader TVK and EnteleKRON ecosystem architecture.
ecosystem.entelescanDescription: Explorer and visibility layer for contracts, treasury wallets, and ecosystem address verification.
ecosystem.entelevaultDescription: Privacy and credential vault structure for secure records, credentials, and controlled access events.
ecosystem.enteleclosDescription: Connected ecosystem operations layer within the EnteleKRON modular architecture.
ecosystem.graphvaultDescription: Structured data and verification graph infrastructure for ecosystem integrity workflows.
ecosystem.chronosealDescription: Proof and timestamping events for verification, integrity, and audit-ready ecosystem records.
ecosystem.qpresenceDescription: Presence, liveness, and access proof capabilities for sensitive verification events.
ecosystem.sentientSignalsDescription: Signal and intelligence pathways across ecosystem modules and trust workflows.
ecosystem.tvkWalletDescription: Wallet infrastructure connected to TVK Group identity, access, and ecosystem services.
ecosystem.tvkIdDescription: Digital identity and access gateway linking profiles, wallet verification, roles, and permissions.
ecosystem.tvkGroupDescription: Parent ecosystem organization connecting TVK Labs, EnteleKRON, SOVRA, and modular infrastructure ventures.
ecosystem.liteRoleDescription: In the current Lite phase, EnteleWALLET provides secure connection, verification, read-only monitoring, and official trust resources. Full module actions and non-custodial wallet functionality are planned for future releases.

roadmap.title: From Lite wallet dashboard to future non-custodial wallet
roadmap.subtitle: EnteleWALLET development is organized in clear phases. EnteleWALLET Lite is the current active phase focused on secure access, verification, and monitoring.
roadmap.phase1Description: Official website, security center, official domain verification, wallet app architecture, wallet connection, safe ownership verification, asset monitoring preparation, and transparency links.
roadmap.phase2Description: EnteleKRON investor account linking, verified wallet profile, vesting display, claim readiness, ENK dashboard integration, official address registry, and support flow.
roadmap.phase3Description: Transaction warnings, malicious approval warnings, wallet risk education, phishing detection guidance, EnteleVAULT integration planning, and audit preparation.
roadmap.phase4Description: Create wallet, import wallet, encrypted key storage, mobile app, browser extension, send/receive, WalletConnect wallet mode, account abstraction, recovery architecture, independent security audits, and bug bounty.
roadmap.fullWalletWarning: Full wallet functionality will require formal security architecture, independent audits, and legal review before release.
roadmap.principleLite: Clear Lite vs future capability labeling
roadmap.principleNonCustodial: No seed phrase or private key storage in Lite
roadmap.principleTransparency: Official domains and transparency resources always visible
roadmap.principleEcosystem: Ecosystem integration aligned with EnteleKRON architecture
roadmap.noticeText: Timelines, features, and module integrations may change based on audits, governance, compliance review, and ecosystem readiness. Future features are not active in EnteleWALLET Lite unless explicitly labeled.

privacy.title: EnteleWALLET Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This Privacy Policy explains how the EnteleWALLET public website and Lite access interface handle information.
privacy.introText: EnteleWALLET respects user privacy and is designed with a security-first approach. EnteleWALLET Lite does not store seed phrases, private keys, or custody funds.
privacy.scopeText: This policy applies to the EnteleWALLET public website, trust pages, and Lite wallet access interface. Separate policies may apply to other TVK Group, EnteleKRON, or investor platform services.
privacy.collectWebsite: Basic website usage data such as page views, language preference, and referral source.
privacy.collectTechnical: Technical information such as browser type, device category, and approximate region derived from network data.
privacy.collectContact: Information you voluntarily submit through contact or security report emails.
privacy.collectWallet: Wallet connection events and publicly available on-chain address data required for verification or read-only monitoring.
privacy.noCollectTitle: Information EnteleWALLET Lite does not collect or store
privacy.useSecurity: To improve website security, detect abuse, and respond to trust reports
privacy.useService: To operate wallet connection, verification, and read-only monitoring features
privacy.useCommunication: To respond to support, contact, and security communications
privacy.useCompliance: To meet legal, compliance, and ecosystem governance requirements where applicable
privacy.shareText: We do not sell personal information. Data may be shared with service providers, security reviewers, or affiliated ecosystem operators only where necessary to operate the service, protect users, or comply with law.
privacy.cookiesText: The website may use cookies or local storage for language preference, session state, and basic analytics. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.retentionText: Information is retained only as long as necessary for security, operations, legal compliance, and legitimate business purposes.
privacy.rightsText: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict certain processing of your information. Contact contact@entelewallet.com for privacy requests.
privacy.securityText: We apply reasonable technical and organizational safeguards. No online service can guarantee absolute security. Users should follow the Security Center guidance and protect their own wallet credentials.
privacy.childrenText: EnteleWALLET is not directed to children under the age required by applicable law for independent digital asset or wallet services.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy as the website, Lite interface, or legal requirements evolve. Material changes will be reflected on this page.

terms.title: EnteleWALLET Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: These Terms of Use govern access to the EnteleWALLET public website and EnteleWALLET Lite interface.
terms.acceptanceText: By accessing or using the EnteleWALLET website or Lite interface, you agree to these Terms of Use and applicable legal notices.
terms.serviceText: EnteleWALLET Lite provides wallet connection, safe signature verification, read-only monitoring, and access to official trust resources for the EnteleKRON ecosystem. It does not custody funds, store seed phrases, or store private keys.
terms.eligibilityText: You must be legally permitted to use wallet connection tools and digital asset interfaces in your jurisdiction. You are responsible for compliance with local laws.
terms.walletText: You remain solely responsible for your wallet, seed phrase, private keys, device security, and any transactions initiated through your own wallet provider.
terms.noAdviceText: EnteleWALLET does not provide investment, tax, legal, or financial advice. Content is provided for informational and operational purposes only.
terms.noGuaranteeText: EnteleWALLET does not guarantee token value, liquidity, exchange listing, returns, uninterrupted service, or future feature delivery.
terms.prohibitedFraud: Fraud, impersonation, phishing, or attempts to compromise other users
terms.prohibitedAbuse: Abuse, scraping, or interference with website or Lite operations
terms.prohibitedIllegal: Use in violation of applicable law or sanctions requirements
terms.prohibitedFalse: False representation of affiliation with EnteleWALLET, EnteleKRON, or TVK Group
terms.thirdPartyText: Wallet providers, blockchain networks, analytics tools, and external ecosystem sites are third-party services governed by their own terms and policies.
terms.ipText: EnteleWALLET branding, website content, and related materials are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Unauthorized use is prohibited.
terms.disclaimerText: The website and Lite interface are provided on an as-available basis without warranties of any kind, to the fullest extent permitted by law.
terms.liabilityText: To the fullest extent permitted by law, EnteleWALLET and affiliated operators are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from use of the website or Lite interface.
terms.changesText: We may update these Terms of Use as the service evolves. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

risk.title: EnteleWALLET Risk Disclosure
risk.subtitle: Digital assets and wallet technologies involve significant risk. Read this disclosure carefully before using EnteleWALLET Lite or interacting with ecosystem tokens.
risk.generalText: Digital assets are volatile and may lose value. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Only interact with assets you understand and can afford to lose.
risk.technologyText: EnteleWALLET and EnteleWALLET Lite are technology projects under active development. Features, timelines, integrations, and interfaces may change without notice.
risk.walletText: You are solely responsible for your wallet credentials. Loss of seed phrase or private key may result in permanent loss of access to assets. EnteleWALLET Lite never requests or stores these credentials.
risk.signatureText: Malicious websites or messages may attempt to trick you into signing harmful transactions. Always verify the domain, message content, and purpose before signing.
risk.tokenText: ENK and other ecosystem tokens may be illiquid, unlisted, subject to regulatory change, or affected by project development delays. No token value, listing, or return is guaranteed.
risk.investorText: Investor dashboards, vesting visibility, and future claims features may be limited to qualified participants and may remain unavailable in EnteleWALLET Lite until officially launched.
risk.thirdPartyText: Wallet extensions, RPC providers, bridges, exchanges, and external dApps are third-party systems outside EnteleWALLET control.
risk.regulatoryText: Digital asset laws vary by jurisdiction and may change. Users are responsible for understanding whether wallet or token interactions are permitted where they live.
risk.noCustodyText: EnteleWALLET Lite does not custody funds, store seed phrases, or store private keys. It is not a bank, exchange, custodian, or investment adviser.
risk.contactText: For official risk or legal questions, contact contact@entelewallet.com. For security concerns, contact security@tvk.group.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about EnteleWALLET Lite, wallet safety, and the EnteleKRON ecosystem.
faq.a1: EnteleWALLET Lite is the current active phase of EnteleWALLET. It is a security-first wallet access layer that lets you connect an existing wallet, verify ownership with safe signatures, and monitor ecosystem assets in read-only mode.
faq.q2: Does EnteleWALLET Lite store my seed phrase or private key?
faq.a2: No. EnteleWALLET Lite does not store seed phrases, private keys, or wallet passwords. It never requests recovery phrases.
faq.q3: Does EnteleWALLET Lite custody my funds?
faq.a3: No. EnteleWALLET Lite does not custody funds or hold assets on your behalf. Your assets remain in your existing wallet.
faq.q4: Can I create a new wallet in EnteleWALLET Lite?
faq.a4: No. EnteleWALLET Lite connects to existing wallets only. It does not generate seed phrases or create new wallets.
faq.a5: EnteleWALLET Lite is designed to connect through established providers such as MetaMask, Rabby, WalletConnect-compatible wallets, Coinbase Wallet, Trust Wallet, Rainbow, and supported Ledger routes.
faq.q6: What kind of signatures does EnteleWALLET use?
faq.a6: Valid EnteleWALLET verification signatures should only prove wallet ownership. They must not transfer tokens, approve spending, create blockchain transactions, or cost gas.
faq.q7: Can I send, swap, or stake through EnteleWALLET Lite?
faq.a7: Not in the current Lite phase. Send, receive, swap, staking, and full non-custodial wallet features are planned for future EnteleWALLET releases.
faq.q8: Is investor vesting or claims available yet?
faq.a8: Vesting dashboard integration and claims workflows are future features. They are not open in EnteleWALLET Lite unless officially announced.
faq.a9: Official EnteleWALLET domains include entelewallet.com, app.entelewallet.com, entelewallet.app, entelewallet.org, and wallet.entelekron.io. Always verify the exact domain before connecting a wallet.
faq.q10: Where can I verify official contracts and treasury wallets?
faq.a10: Use the EnteleKRON Transparency Center to verify official contracts, treasury wallets, presale wallets, and ecosystem addresses.
faq.q11: Will EnteleWALLET staff ever ask for my seed phrase?
faq.a11: Never. EnteleWALLET, EnteleKRON, TVK Group, TVK Labs, SOVRA, support staff, admins, partners, or community moderators will never ask for your seed phrase, private key, or remote device access.
faq.q12: How do I report a phishing site or security issue?
faq.a12: Report vulnerabilities, phishing domains, or impersonation attempts to security@tvk.group or security@entelewallet.com.
faq.a13: The EnteleWALLET app is being prepared in a separate repository. The public website provides trust resources, documentation, and Lite access guidance.
faq.a14: No. EnteleWALLET does not provide investment, tax, legal, or financial advice and does not guarantee token value, liquidity, listing, or returns.

networks.title: Supported networks & TVK ecosystem modules
networks.subtitle: EnteleWALLET uses a modular chain registry. Networks are enabled only after RPC verification, signing tests, explorer checks, and balance/token detection — never added blindly.
networks.securityRule: No network is enabled for real transactions until it passes RPC verification, transaction signing tests, explorer verification, and balance/token detection tests.
networks.registryNote: This registry is the canonical Phase 1 network list for EnteleWALLET. The wallet app consumes this data and applies verification gates before enabling transactions.
